title: Cannot post special characters within the items
excerpt:
When I added some special character in the item_name then I got an error as the back response. 
When I remove them the item added successfully.

posts.author: sk09 (SK)
posts.cookedHtml:
When I added some special character in the item_name then I got an error as the back response.

When I remove them the item added successfully.

posts.author: Scott-monday.com (Scott Underwood)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @sk09

Do you happen to have any examples of the special characters that you’re running into this issue with?

I’d love to take a closer look into this for you!

-Scott
